name: swarmauri-community

metadata.name: swarmauri-community
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Community version of the swarmauri framework

documentation:
# Swarmauri Community

## Community
- **Third-Party Plug-in Integration**: Concrete classes designed to extend the framework’s capabilities by utilizing third-party libraries and plugins.
- **Open Source Contributions**: A collaborative space for developers to contribute new components, plug-ins, and features.


Visit us at: https://swarmauri.com
Follow us at: https://github.com/swarmauri

documentation:
Retrieve the top_k most relevant documents based on the given query.
For the purpose of this example, this method performs a basic search.

Args:
    query (str): The query string used for document retrieval.
    top_k (int): The number of top relevant documents to retrieve.

Returns:
    List[Document]: A list of the top_k most relevant documents.

methods.name: swarmauri_community.vector_stores.PersistentQdrantVectorStore.PersistentQdrantVectorStore.model_dump_json
documentation: Override the model_dump_json method

PersistentQdrantVectorStore is a concrete implementation that integrates functionality
for saving, loading, storing, and retrieving vector documents, leveraging a locally
hosted Qdrant instance as the backend.

methods.name: swarmauri_community.vector_stores.Neo4jVectorStore.Neo4jVectorStore.retrieve
documentation:
Retrieve the top_k most similar documents to the query based on Levenshtein distance using APOC's apoc.text.distance.

```
param query

Query string

param top_k

Number of top similar documents to retrieve

param string_field

Specific field to apply Levenshtein distance (default: 'content')

return

List of Document objects
```

documentation:
Calculate the number of tokens in the given text.
Args:

Returns:
    int: The number of tokens in the text, or None if an error occurs.
A metric class to estimate the number of tokens in a given text.

classes.name: swarmauri_community.metrics.concrete.MutualInformationMetric.MutualInformationMetric

methods.name: swarmauri_community.metrics.concrete.MutualInformationMetric.MutualInformationMetric.calculate
documentation:
Calculate the average mutual information between the features and the target column.

Parameters:
- data (pd.DataFrame): A DataFrame containing both the features and the target column.

- target_column (str) The name of the target column in the DataFrame.

Returns:
- float: The average mutual information across all feature columns.

A metric class to calculate mutual information between features and a target column in a given dataset.

This class computes the mutual information between each feature in a DataFrame (excluding the target column)
and the target column itself, and returns the average mutual information score.

Args:
    **kwargs: Additional keyword arguments.

methods.name: swarmauri_community.vector_stores.PineconeVectorStore.PineconeVectorStore.delete
documentation: Delete the Pinecone index if it exists.

methods.name: swarmauri_community.vector_stores.PineconeVectorStore.PineconeVectorStore.connect
documentation:
Connect to the Pinecone index, creating it if it doesn't exist.

Args:
    metric (Optional[str]): The distance metric to use. Defaults to "cosine".
    cloud (Optional[str]): The cloud provider to use. Defaults to "aws".
    region (Optional[str]): The region to use. Defaults to "us-east-1".

methods.name: swarmauri_community.vector_stores.PineconeVectorStore.PineconeVectorStore.disconnect
documentation: Disconnect from the Pinecone index.

methods.name: swarmauri_community.vector_stores.PineconeVectorStore.PineconeVectorStore._prepare_vector
documentation:
Prepare a vector for insertion into the Pinecone index.

Args:
    document (Document): The document to prepare.

Returns:
    Dict[str, Any]: A dictionary containing the prepared vector data.

methods.name: swarmauri_community.vector_stores.PineconeVectorStore.PineconeVectorStore.add_document
documentation:
Add a single document to the Pinecone index.

Args:
    document (Document): The document to add.
    namespace (Optional[str]): The namespace to add the document to. Defaults to "".

methods.name: swarmauri_community.vector_stores.PineconeVectorStore.PineconeVectorStore.add_documents
documentation:
Add multiple documents to the Pinecone index in batches.

Args:
    documents (List[Document]): The list of documents to add.
    namespace (Optional[str]): The namespace to add the documents to. Defaults to "".
    batch_size (int): The number of documents to add in each batch. Defaults to 200.

methods.name: swarmauri_community.vector_stores.PineconeVectorStore.PineconeVectorStore.get_document
documentation:
Retrieve a single document from the Pinecone index by its ID.

Args:
    id (str): The ID of the document to retrieve.
    namespace (Optional[str]): The namespace to search in. Defaults to "".

Returns:
    Union[Document, None]: The retrieved document, or None if not found.

methods.name: swarmauri_community.vector_stores.PineconeVectorStore.PineconeVectorStore._get_ids_from_query
documentation:
Get document IDs from a query vector.

Args:
    input_vector: The input vector to query.

methods.name: swarmauri_community.vector_stores.PineconeVectorStore.PineconeVectorStore._get_all_ids_from_client
documentation:
Get all document IDs from the Pinecone index.

Args:
    namespace (Optional[str]): The namespace to search in. Defaults to "".

Returns:
    set: A set of all document IDs in the index.

methods.name: swarmauri_community.vector_stores.PineconeVectorStore.PineconeVectorStore.get_all_documents
documentation:
Retrieve all documents from the Pinecone index.

Args:
    namespace (Optional[str]): The namespace to search in. Defaults to "".

Returns:
    List[Document]: A list of all documents in the index.

methods.name: swarmauri_community.vector_stores.PineconeVectorStore.PineconeVectorStore.delete_document
documentation:
Delete a single document from the Pinecone index.

Args:
    id (str): The ID of the document to delete.
    namespace (Optional[str]): The namespace to delete from. Defaults to "".

methods.name: swarmauri_community.vector_stores.PineconeVectorStore.PineconeVectorStore.clear_documents
documentation:
Delete all documents from the Pinecone index in a given namespace.

Args:
    namespace (Optional[str]): The namespace to clear. Defaults to "".

methods.name: swarmauri_community.vector_stores.PineconeVectorStore.PineconeVectorStore.update_document
documentation:
Update a document in the Pinecone index.

Args:
    id (str): The ID of the document to update.
    document (Document): The updated document.
    namespace (Optional[str]): The namespace of the document. Defaults to "".

methods.name: swarmauri_community.vector_stores.PineconeVectorStore.PineconeVectorStore.document_count
documentation:
Get the number of documents in the Pinecone index.

Args:
    namespace (Optional[str]): The namespace to count documents in. Defaults to "".

Returns:
    int: The number of documents in the index.

methods.name: swarmauri_community.vector_stores.PineconeVectorStore.PineconeVectorStore.retrieve
documentation:
Retrieve documents from the Pinecone index based on a query string.

Args:
    query (str): The query string to search for.
    top_k (int): The number of results to return. Defaults to 5.
    namespace (Optional[str]): The namespace to search in. Defaults to "".

Returns:
    List[Document]: A list of retrieved documents.

methods.name: swarmauri_community.vector_stores.PineconeVectorStore.PineconeVectorStore.model_dump_json
documentation: Override the model_dump_json method

A vector store implementation using Pinecone as the backend.

This class provides methods to interact with a Pinecone index, including
adding, retrieving, updating, and deleting documents, as well as performing
similarity searches.

classes.name: swarmauri_community.tools.concrete.SentimentAnalysisTool.SentimentAnalysisTool

methods.name: swarmauri_community.tools.concrete.SentimentAnalysisTool.SentimentAnalysisTool.__call__
documentation:
Performs sentiment analysis on the given text.

Args:
    text (str): The text to analyze.

Returns:
    Dict[str, str]: A dictionary containing the sentiment analysis result.
        The dictionary has a single key-value pair, where the key is "sentiment"
        and the value is the sentiment label.
Raises:
    RuntimeError: If sentiment analysis fails.
A tool for analyzing the sentiment of the given text using Hugging Face's transformers.

methods.name: swarmauri_community.tools.concrete.ZapierHookTool.ZapierHookTool.__call__
documentation:
Enable the tool to be called directly with the given payload and return the zap response.

Parameters:
payload (str): The input string to be processed by the tool.

Returns:
Dict\[str, str\]: A dictionary with a single key "zap_response", containing the result of executing the zap.

Example:
\>>> tool = YourToolClass()
\>>> result = tool("some payload")
\>>> print(result)
{'zap_response': 'processed result'}

methods.name: swarmauri_community.tools.concrete.SMOGIndexTool.SMOGIndexTool.count_polysyllables
documentation:
Count the number of polysyllabic words (words with three or more syllables) in the text.

Parameters:
    text (str): The text to analyze.

Returns:
    int: The number of polysyllabic words in the text.

methods.name: swarmauri_community.tools.concrete.SMOGIndexTool.SMOGIndexTool.count_syllables
documentation:
Count the number of syllables in a given word.

Parameters:
    word (str): The word to analyze.

Returns:

modules.name: swarmauri_community.tools.concrete.PsutilTool
documentation: standard/tools/concrete/PsutilTool.py

methods.name: swarmauri_community.tools.concrete.PsutilTool.PsutilTool.__call__
documentation:
Call the appropriate method based on the provided info_type and return the corresponding system information.

Parameters:
info_type (str): The type of system information requested. Valid options are 'cpu', 'memory', 'disk',

> 'network', or 'sensors'.

Returns:
Dict\[str, Any\]: A dictionary where the key is the `info_type` and the value is the result of the corresponding

> system information retrieval method.

Raises:
ValueError: If an invalid `info_type` is provided.

Example:
\>>> tool = YourToolClass()
\>>> result = tool("cpu")
\>>> print(result)
{'cpu': {...}}

modules.name: swarmauri_community.tools.concrete.FoliumTool
documentation: standard/tools/concrete/FoliumTool.py

methods.name: swarmauri_community.tools.concrete.FoliumTool.FoliumTool.__call__
documentation:
Generate a folium map with markers and return the map as a base64-encoded image.

Parameters:
map_center (Tuple[float, float]): Latitude and longitude for the map's center.
markers (List\[Tuple[float, float, str]\]): A list of markers, where each marker is a tuple containing latitude,

> longitude, and popup text.

Returns:
Dict\[str, str\]: A dictionary containing the base64-encoded image of the generated map, with the key 'image_b64'.

Example:
\>>> tool = FoliumTool()
\>>> map_center = (40.7128, -74.0060)
\>>> markers = [(40.7128, -74.0060, "Marker 1"), (40.7328, -74.0010, "Marker 2")]
\>>> result = tool(map_center, markers)
\>>> print(result['image_b64']) # Prints the base64 string of the map image

methods.name: swarmauri_community.tools.concrete.SentenceComplexityTool.SentenceComplexityTool.__call__
documentation:
Evaluate sentence complexity based on average sentence length and the number of clauses.

Parameters:
- text (str): The text to analyze.

Returns:
- dict: A dictionary containing average sentence length and average number of clauses per sentence.

modules.name: swarmauri_community.tools.concrete.QrCodeGeneratorTool
documentation: standard/tools/concrete/QrCodeGeneratorTool.py

methods.name: swarmauri_community.tools.concrete.QrCodeGeneratorTool.QrCodeGeneratorTool.__call__
documentation:
Generate a QR code from the provided data and return the QR code image as a base64-encoded string.

Parameters:
    data (str): The data to encode in the QR code.

Returns:
    Dict[str, str]: A dictionary containing the base64-encoded QR code image, with the key 'image_b64'.

Example:
    >>> tool = QrCodeGeneratorTool()
    >>> result = tool("Hello, world!")
    >>> print(result['image_b64'])  # Prints the base64 string of the QR code image

Executes the Dale-Chall Readability tool and returns the readability score using textstat.

A tool for calculating the Dale-Chall Readability Score using the textstat library.

    name (str): The name of the tool.
    type (Literal["DaleChallReadabilityTool"]): The type of the tool.

methods.name: swarmauri_community.tools.concrete.GmailSendTool.GmailSendTool.authenticate

Authenticates the user and creates a Gmail API service for sending emails.
This method returns the service instance, without saving it as an attribute.

methods.name: swarmauri_community.tools.concrete.GmailSendTool.GmailSendTool.create_message
documentation:
Create a MIMEText message for sending an email.

to (str): The email address of the recipient.
subject (str): The subject of the email.
message_text (str): The HTML body of the email.

Dict[str, str]: The created MIMEText message in a format suitable for Gmail API.

methods.name: swarmauri_community.tools.concrete.GmailSendTool.GmailSendTool.__call__
documentation:
Sends an email to the specified recipients with the given subject and HTML message.

Parameters:
    recipients (str): The email address of the recipients, separated by commas.
    subject (str): The subject of the email.
    htmlMsg (str): The HTML content of the email body.

Returns:
    Dict[str, str]: A message indicating the status of the email sending process.
